creator: mw8124@gmail.com
text:
Why need to activate Cash app card for the lowset transaction?
The reason to activate Cash app card for the lowest transaction is that you can’t use your Cash app account for making transactions until you activate it. You are required to get a Cash card by hitting on the Get Cash Card button, once you get it, then you have to activate it to utilize for the transaction. https://www.cashappgroups.com/blog/how-to-activate-cash-app-card/
